# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_consul_kv_scheme_docs_explain_env_url_override__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/plugins/lookup/consul_kv.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    doc_match = re.search('DOCUMENTATION\\s*=\\s*"""\\n(?P<doc>.*)\\n"""', source, re.S)
    assert doc_match, 'Expected a DOCUMENTATION triple-quoted string in consul_kv.py'

def test_consul_kv_scheme_docs_explain_env_url_override__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/plugins/lookup/consul_kv.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    doc_match = re.search('DOCUMENTATION\\s*=\\s*"""\\n(?P<doc>.*)\\n"""', source, re.S)
    documentation = doc_match.group('doc')
    scheme_match = re.search('(?ms)^\\s+scheme:\\s*\\n(?P<body>(?:^\\s{8,}.*\\n)+)', documentation)
    assert scheme_match, "DOCUMENTATION must contain an 'options: scheme' entry"

def test_consul_kv_scheme_docs_explain_env_url_override__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/plugins/lookup/consul_kv.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    doc_match = re.search('DOCUMENTATION\\s*=\\s*"""\\n(?P<doc>.*)\\n"""', source, re.S)
    documentation = doc_match.group('doc')
    scheme_match = re.search('(?ms)^\\s+scheme:\\s*\\n(?P<body>(?:^\\s{8,}.*\\n)+)', documentation)
    scheme_block = 'scheme:\n' + scheme_match.group('body')
    assert 'If you use C(ANSIBLE_CONSUL_URL) this value will be used from there.' in scheme_block, 'Expected the scheme option documentation to explicitly state that scheme is taken from ANSIBLE_CONSUL_URL when that env var is used (added in the addressed review).'
